Hermès Herbag - Beige Canvas & Brown Leather

Product Details:
Brand: Hermès
Model: Herbag
Material: Durable Canvas (Toile) and Premium Leather
Color: Beige/Off-White Canvas with Brown Leather
Dimensions: 41 x 37 x 13.5 cm
Year/Stamp: Year 2000 Stamp

Design & Features:
A timeless classic featuring a beautiful combination of beige canvas and brown leather. The material is highly durable. Its minimalist and elegant design is highlighted by the signature delicate lock detailing, offering a low-key yet luxurious and textured overall appearance.

Accessories Included:
Original shoulder strap, inner pouch, padlock, and metal clasp.

Condition Report:
Excellent pre-owned condition (9.8/10 or 98% new). The bag has been exceptionally well-maintained with minimal signs of wear. Please review all provided photos carefully before placing your order to confirm the condition.
